Task.Name: Phase 0: Initialization
Task.Notes: Governance, legal, assessment baseline

Task.Name: 0.1 Project Setup & Governance
Task.Notes: PMO, steering, RACI

Task.Name: Appoint Zebra Programme Leads
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Seller and Buyer sponsors appointed

Task.Name: Establish Steering Committee
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead | First steering committee session

Task.Name: Define RACI and Governance Model
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + KPMG PMO Lead | Approval of governance structure

Task.Name: Set Up PMO Tools and Collaboration Site
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead | SharePoint site, project tracking active

Task.Name: Onboard KPMG and RoboGmbH Teams
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + RoboGmbH IT Manager | All teams mobilized

Task.Name: 0.2 IT Landscape Assessment - 37 Sites
Task.Notes: Inventory, apps, infra, scope

Task.Name: Application Portfolio Inventory (~208 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Packaging-specific apps; flag shared Bosch dependencies

Task.Name: IT Infrastructure As-Is Mapping (37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Site surveys top 15 locations; EMEA/APAC prioritized

Task.Name: ERP Landscape Analysis (SAP scope)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Identify packaging-specific vs shared SAP; separation complexity

Task.Name: Data Ownership & Separation Rules (Draft)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect | Data classification baseline

Task.Name: Contract & Licence Inventory (~208 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager | Change of control review; FOSS compliance; ~3,500 device licences

Task.Name: HR IT Systems & Payroll Separation (37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect | Country-by-country HR rules (Germany, China, India, Mexico, etc.)

Task.Name: OT & Production IT Assessment
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Production systems; safety certifications; ICS/SCADA scope

Task.Name: Country-Specific Legal Requirements (Multi-region)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager | Germany works council; China PIPL; India; Mexico SAT delays

Task.Name: 0.3 Project Charter & Scope Definition
Task.Notes: Charter, approval, scope frozen

Task.Name: Draft Zebra Project Charter
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Executive charter document

Task.Name: Define Scope Boundaries (37 sites, 3,500+ users, 208 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + KPMG SAP Architect | Stand Alone model confirmed; no Merger Zone

Task.Name: Guiding Principles Workshop
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + All Workstream Leads | First Make It Work; priorities set

Task.Name: TSA Framework Preliminary Scope
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Bosch operates all IT until Day 1; TSA scope defined

Task.Name: Project Charter Approval & Gate QG0
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead | Charter signed; Phase 0 gate approval

Task.Name: QG0 - Initialization Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Buyer Sponsor | Charter approved; inventory confirmed; governance ready

Task.Name: Phase 1: Concept
Task.Notes: Requirements, design strategy, baseline planning

Task.Name: 1.1 Detailed As-Is Analysis
Task.Notes: Landscape detail, dependencies

Task.Name: Application Portfolio Deep Dive (LeanIX, 208 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Flag Bosch shared dependencies; categorize critical vs standard

Task.Name: SAP Landscape Detailed Analysis
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Identify separation complexity; module scope

Task.Name: Infrastructure Detailed Mapping (37 sites, top 15 surveyed)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | WAN, LAN, co-lo, security topology

Task.Name: Contract & Licence Final Inventory (208 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager | Change of control clause review; vendor dependencies

Task.Name: HR & Payroll System Separation (Multi-region)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect | Region-specific payroll rules finalized

Task.Name: 1.2 Stand-Alone Architecture Design Strategy
Task.Notes: Architecture concept (no Merger Zone)

Task.Name: Architecture Concept Workshop (Stand Alone approach)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Confirm Stand Alone; no Merger Zone; target architecture

Task.Name: WAN & Network Architecture (37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Hub-and-spoke model; 1-2 regional co-lo; 4-6 month lead time

Task.Name: Active Directory Design (New Forest)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | New AD forest for Zebra; fully independent from Bosch

Task.Name: M365 & Azure Tenant Design (3,500+ mailboxes)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | New M365 tenant; OneDrive, Teams in scope

Task.Name: Co-Location & Data Centre Selection (1-2 regional hubs)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager | Primary hub selection; decision by QG1

Task.Name: Security Architecture (NewCo Zebra independent)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Independent SOC; security baseline

Task.Name: IAM & Identity Design (Decouple from Bosch)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | New IAM platform; decouple from Bosch Saviynt

Task.Name: 1.3 Zebra IT Migration Strategy
Task.Notes: ERP, apps, clients, data

Task.Name: ERP Migration Strategy Decision (Shell Copy vs Greenfield)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Shell copy benchmarked 9-12 months; decision by QG1

Task.Name: Application Categorization & Wave Planning (208 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect | Wave 1 ~60 critical; Wave 2 ~80 standard; Wave 3 ~68 local/OT

Task.Name: Data Migration & Separation Strategy
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + KPMG Data Engineer | Non-selective approach; residual data in Bosch until TSA exit

Task.Name: TSA Service Catalogue Definition
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Catalogue all Bosch services Zebra requires; exit criteria per service

Task.Name: Zebra Stand-Alone Operating Model (post-TSA)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | All services exit directly post-TSA; define operating model

Task.Name: 1.4 Client Device & Workplace Strategy
Task.Notes: 3,500+ device migration approach

Task.Name: Client Device Inventory & Assessment (~3,500 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Device age, type, replacement plan for out-of-support

Task.Name: Client Migration Approach (Wave-based reimaging)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | 3,500 devices across 37 sites; EMEA/APAC/Americas stagger

Task.Name: 1.5 Planning & Baseline
Task.Notes: Schedule, budget, risk baseline

Task.Name: Detailed Project Plan Development
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Full phase schedule with dependencies

Task.Name: Risk Register Baseline (Initial risks)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager | Risk identification and scoring

Task.Name: OPL Establishment & Tracking
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead | Open Points List system active

Task.Name: Resource Plan & Budget Baseline
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Labour and CAPEX baseline

Task.Name: QG1 - Concept Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Buyer Sponsor | Architecture approved; ERP strategy decided; TSA catalogue signed; proceed to Design

Task.Name: Phase 2: Architecture & Design
Task.Notes: Detailed design, vendor selection, architecture finalization

Task.Name: 2.1 Infrastructure Design & Procurement
Task.Notes: WAN, co-lo, AD, M365, security design

Task.Name: WAN Provider Selection & Ordering (37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Order immediately after design; 4-6 month lead time

Task.Name: Co-Location Data Centre Procurement (1-2 regional hubs)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager | Primary EMEA co-locator for Zebra DC

Task.Name: Active Directory Detailed Configuration
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | New Zebra AD forest specifications; delegation model

Task.Name: M365 Tenant & Azure Configuration (3,500+ mailboxes)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Tenant isolation; licensing; governance

Task.Name: Security & Firewall Architecture Finalization
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Network security, endpoint security, DLP policies

Task.Name: IAM Platform & SSO Design
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Identity governance, provisioning automation

Task.Name: CMDB & ITSM Platform Design
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | ServiceNow or alternative ITSM platform configuration

Task.Name: 2.2 SAP & ERP Design
Task.Notes: Shell copy prep, interfaces, auth design

Task.Name: SAP System Landscape Detail & Separation
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Module scope for Zebra packaging

Task.Name: SAP Shell Copy Detailed Approach & Timeline
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Build Lead | Extraction approach; timeline; re-configuration items

Task.Name: SAP Interfaces & Integration Design (APIs)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Build Lead + KPMG Data Engineer | Identify all inbound/outbound interfaces; EDI approach

Task.Name: SAP Authorization & Security Design
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | User roles; segregation of duties; authorization matrix

Task.Name: SAP Test Environment & Tools Selection
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | SIT, UAT environment specifications; performance testing tools

Task.Name: 2.3 Application Migration Design (208 apps)
Task.Notes: Wave definition, packaging, integration strategy

Task.Name: Application Wave Refinement & Dependencies
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect | Wave 1/2/3 app list finalized; cross-wave dependencies

Task.Name: Application Package Development (Wave 1 critical ~60 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Deployment package; configuration; cutover script

Task.Name: Custom App Adaptation Design (Re-point to Zebra domain)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect | Domain, AD, M365, ITSM configuration changes

Task.Name: 2.4 Client Workplace Design & Imaging
Task.Notes: Device imaging, wave plan

Task.Name: Standard Image Development (SCCM/Intune)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Standard image for Zebra domain; hardware refresh plan

Task.Name: Regional Wave Plan (EMEA / APAC / Americas devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Wave sequencing; logistics; regional priorities

Task.Name: 2.5 Cutover Strategy & TSA Finalization
Task.Notes: Go-live plan, TSA contracts

Task.Name: Detailed Cutover Plan (37 sites, 208 apps, SAP)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + KPMG SAP Architect | Parallel run approach; rollback plan; timing sequence

Task.Name: TSA Service Descriptions Final (All 37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Each TSA service line; exit date; acceptance criteria

Task.Name: TSA SLA & KPI Framework
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager | SLA levels; reporting cadence

Task.Name: TSA Legal & Contracts Final Review
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager | Contract finalization and signature readiness

Task.Name: QG2/3 - Design Quality Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Buyer Sponsor | Infrastructure designed; ERP designed; apps packaged; devices planned; TSA approved; proceed to Build

Task.Name: Phase 3: Development, Build & Test
Task.Notes: Infrastructure build, ERP setup, app prep, testing

Task.Name: 3.1 Infrastructure Build (37 sites)
Task.Notes: WAN, co-lo, AD, M365, security, operations setup

Task.Name: WAN Circuits Delivery (EMEA batch 1, ~8 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | 4-6 month lead completed; circuit testing

Task.Name: WAN Circuits Delivery (APAC batch 1, ~6 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | China local provider; stagger by country

Task.Name: WAN Circuits Delivery (Americas batch 1, ~4-5 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Mexico legal entity confirmed before delivery

Task.Name: Co-Location DC Setup & Testing
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Cooling, power, connectivity; Zebra servers racked

Task.Name: Active Directory Build & User Provisioning
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | All 3,500+ users and app access configured

Task.Name: M365 Tenant & Azure Production Build
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | 3,500+ mailboxes provisioned; OneDrive structure built

Task.Name: Security & Firewall Implementation
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Security appliances; DLP; endpoint protection

Task.Name: IAM Platform Deployment & User Sync
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | SSO, provisioning automation for 3,500+ users

Task.Name: CMDB & ITSM Platform Setup (Assets, CIs)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Asset inventory; service catalogue; incident management

Task.Name: Telephony Platform Setup & Number Porting (37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager | Phone system config; 4-8 weeks per operator per site

Task.Name: File Share Infrastructure & User Documents
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | NAS/Cloud setup for 3,500+ users; shared directories

Task.Name: Backup & Disaster Recovery Setup
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Backup solution; RTO/RPO targets defined

Task.Name: 3.2 SAP & ERP Development
Task.Notes: Shell copy, build, interfaces, auth, testing

Task.Name: SAP System Landscape Build (Zebra-specific modules)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Build Lead + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Base system build; module activation

Task.Name: SAP Shell Copy Data Extraction & Preparation
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Build Lead + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Master data cleanup; extraction from Bosch SAP

Task.Name: Data Migration Dry Run 1 (Test)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Engineer + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Extract, transform, load; validation

Task.Name: Data Migration Dry Run 2 (Refinement)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Engineer + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Fix issues from Dry Run 1

Task.Name: SAP Interfaces & Integration Development
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Build Lead + KPMG Data Engineer | APIs, EDI mappings, middleware configuration

Task.Name: SAP Authorization & Security Hardening
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | User role assignments; access control verification

Task.Name: SAP Test Environment Build (SIT ready)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | SIT/UAT environment ready for integration testing

Task.Name: 3.3 Application Migration Preparation (208 apps)
Task.Notes: Wave packages, custom adaptation, integration test prep

Task.Name: Wave 1 Application Packaging (Critical ~60 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Deployment packages; configuration parameters

Task.Name: Wave 2 Application Packaging (Standard ~80 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | packaging during Wave 1 execution prep

Task.Name: Wave 3 Application Packaging (Local/OT ~68 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Regional and OT-specific apps

Task.Name: Custom Application Adaptation for Zebra Environment
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Domain re-point, AD, M365, ITSM integration

Task.Name: Application Integration Development (APIs, Data mapping)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Engineer + KPMG SAP Build Lead | Cross-app and SAP integration development

Task.Name: Application Integration Testing Prep
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Test Specialist | Test scenario prep; test data setup

Task.Name: 3.4 Client Workplace, Device & M365 Migration (ALL PRE-GoLive)
Task.Notes: Device imaging, all 5 migration waves, M365 mailbox migration ALL before QG4

Task.Name: SCCM / Intune Configuration (Standard image)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Device management platform setup

Task.Name: Device Imaging & Standard OS Build
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Standard image production; imaging tooling

Task.Name: Regional Wave Preparation (EMEA / APAC / Americas logistics)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Imaging schedule; regional IT team coordination

Task.Name: User Profile & OneDrive Migration Tooling (Setup)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Migration tools for user data; setup & testing

Task.Name: Device Migration Wave 1 (EMEA hub sites, ~500 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | First regional wave; EMEA priority (pre-GoLive)

Task.Name: Device Migration Wave 2 (APAC sites, ~700 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Parallel with Wave 1; China coordination (pre-GoLive)

Task.Name: Device Migration Wave 3 (EMEA remaining, ~300 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Remaining EMEA sites (pre-GoLive)

Task.Name: Device Migration Wave 4 (Americas, ~500 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Americas sites (pre-GoLive)

Task.Name: Device Migration Wave 5 (Remaining & exceptions, ~400 devices)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Stragglers, replacements before GoLive (pre-GoLive)

Task.Name: M365 Mailbox & OneDrive Migration (3,500+ users — ALL PRE-GoLive)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Batched user mailbox & OneDrive migration BEFORE GoLive so users ready Day 1

Task.Name: 3.5 System Integration Testing & UAT
Task.Notes: SIT, integration tests, UAT

Task.Name: SAP System Integration Test 1 (SIT1)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Specialist + KPMG Test Specialist + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Integration of apps + SAP; validation

Task.Name: Application Integration Testing (Wave 1 + SAP)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Test Specialist + KPMG Data Architect | End-to-end Wave 1 app integration

Task.Name: User Acceptance Testing (Business owners, 37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG QA Lead + KPMG Test Specialist + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Sign-off on functional & SAP transactions; regional testers; device reimaging validation

Task.Name: Dress Rehearsal & Cutover Simulation
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + KPMG SAP Build Lead + KPMG Test Specialist | Full dry-run with rollback; issue log closeout; migration validation

Task.Name: Ready for QG4 Gate Review
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead | All infrastructure, SAP, apps ready; 3,500 devices reimaged & migrated; 3,500 mailboxes migrated; UAT passed; dress rehearsal successful

Task.Name: Phase 4: GoLive & Closure
Task.Notes: Cutover, hypercare, TSA exit, closure

Task.Name: 4.1 GoLive Day 1 Activities
Task.Notes: Final data load, cutover execution, activation

Task.Name: Final Data Load & Production Cutover
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Engineer + KPMG SAP Build Lead + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Final shell copy data load; integrity validation

Task.Name: SAP Go-Live Activation
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Specialist + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | SAP production activation for Zebra

Task.Name: Application Go-Live Activation (Wave 1, 60 apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Apps cut to production; validation

Task.Name: Network & Domain Cutover (All 37 sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | AD cutover, DNS, WAN routing activation

Task.Name: Help Desk 24x7 Activation
Task.Notes: Resources: RoboGmbH IT Manager + KPMG Test Specialist | Multi-region support live for 3,500 reimaged+migrated users (all devices ready pre-GoLive)

Task.Name: GoLive Day 1 Milestone
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Buyer Sponsor | Zebra business live on independent IT systems (all devices reimaged, all mailboxes migrated PRE-GoLive); TSA support begins

Task.Name: 4.2 Hypercare & Stabilization (90 days)
Task.Notes: 24x7 support, stabilization, issue resolution; NO migrations post-GoLive

Task.Name: Daily Operations Standups & Issue Management
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Regional EMEA/APAC/Americas standups; P1/P2 hotline

Task.Name: Performance Monitoring & Optimization
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | System performance tuning; infrastructure adjustments

Task.Name: Data Integrity & Reconciliation (Bosch to Zebra)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Engineer + RoboGmbH ERP Specialist | Verify all data migrated correctly; fix reconciliation items

Task.Name: Issue Backlog & Prioritized Fix List
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Test Specialist + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Capture, prioritize, deploy hotfixes; spans hypercare period

Task.Name: Wave 2 Application Go-Live (80 standard apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Phased app activation after Wave 1 stabilization

Task.Name: Wave 3 Application Go-Live (68 local/OT apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Final app activation; OT system go-live within hypercare window

Task.Name: Hypercare Close-Out Sign-Off
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Buyer Sponsor | Hypercare period officially closed (90 days complete); transition to steady state

Task.Name: 4.3 TSA Transition & Service Exit
Task.Notes: TSA service wave exit; handover to Zebra IT (after hypercare closes)

Task.Name: TSA Exit Planning per Service Line
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Define exit criteria; acceptance tests per service

Task.Name: TSA Infrastructure Services Exit (Wave 1)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + RoboGmbH IT Manager | Network, data centre, security handoff

Task.Name: TSA Application & ERP Services Exit (Wave 2)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Specialist + RoboGmbH IT Manager | SAP, apps, integration handoff

Task.Name: TSA Exit Confirmation (Bosch services fully terminated)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Buyer Sponsor | All TSA services exited; Zebra IT fully independent

Task.Name: 4.4 Programme Closure
Task.Notes: Lessons learned, archive, final sign-off

Task.Name: Lessons Learned Workshop (All regions)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + All Workstream Leads | Debrief; best practices; challenges documented

Task.Name: Programme Closure Report & Knowledge Transfer
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Final report; operational runbooks; team debrief

Task.Name: Financial Reconciliation & Archive
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead | Finance closeout; CAPEX/labour final reconciliation

Task.Name: QG5 - Programme Closure Gate
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Buyer Sponsor | Hypercare closed (90 days); TSA fully exited; Zebra IT independent; programme formally closed

Task.Name: Project Completion
Task.Notes: All artifacts archived; final sign-off
